title: Store: CRUD for groups + group_members
description:
What: Add GroupRow struct and CRUD async methods to relay/src/store.rs for group and membership persistence.

Structs to add:
  pub struct GroupRow { pub group_id: String, pub created_by: String, pub name: String, pub created_at: String }

Methods to add to Store:
  pub async fn create_group(group_id: &str, created_by: &str, name: &str) -> Result<()>  -- INSERT OR IGNORE
  pub async fn get_group(group_id: &str) -> Result<Option<GroupRow>>
  pub async fn list_groups_for_user(pub_id: &str) -> Result<Vec<GroupRow>>  -- JOIN with group_members
  pub async fn add_group_member(group_id: &str, pub_id: &str) -> Result<()>  -- INSERT OR IGNORE
  pub async fn remove_group_member(group_id: &str, pub_id: &str) -> Result<()>
  pub async fn list_group_members(group_id: &str) -> Result<Vec<String>>  -- vec of pub_ids
  pub async fn is_group_member(group_id: &str, pub_id: &str) -> Result<bool>
  pub async fn member_count(group_id: &str) -> Result<u64>
  pub async fn delete_group(group_id: &str) -> Result<()>  -- also deletes group_members rows

Defensive rules:
- i64::try_from() for any u64/usize→i64 binding
- u64::try_from() for i64→u64 reads from COUNT(*)
- No unwrap() in production
- All datetime values use datetime() not rfc3339

Team: standard R+I+T
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-relay passes; CRUD roundtrips verified; is_group_member returns false for non-members; delete_group cascades to members
